description: A production incident has occurred: all Docker volumes for the AcmeCorp Music Store application were accidentally deleted. Restore the service at ~/projects/acme-musicstore using the provided backup files in the backups/ directory (chinook_db.sql for PostgreSQL and redis_restore.txt for Redis). Ensure the application stack is running and the data is fully restored. Verify the restoration by checking the /api/stats endpoint. Create an executable backup script at ~/projects/acme-musicstore/backup.sh that automates dumping the database and Redis data to backups/latest/, and run it to confirm it functions correctly.
